provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly close-up detail study, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft directional lighting, worn and damaged sci-fi surface, extreme visible material texture and wear detail, visible brushstrokes, tight crop on surface detail, perfectly smooth brushed aluminum surface with even satin finish, factory-new appearance, no scratches marks or wear, showroom quality metal panel
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, wide shot, full environment, people, characters, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Factory-new brushed aluminum with even satin finish. No wear, no history, showroom quality.

assertions.rationale: Partially meets single upper-left warm lighting with soft ao shadows (50%)
Colors too bright or saturated — not muted/dusty
Partially meets full body front-facing on plain background, 70-85% fill (50%)
Bright saturated colors present — violates muted/dusty rule
Reads as generic sci-fi — not faction-specific (5%)

canon_explanation: Rejected: fails RND-001, RND-003, RND-005, COL-003, CLO-003. Factory-new brushed aluminum with even satin finish. No wear, no history, showroom quality.
